ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region code where the customer resides */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the customer in months */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Marital status (1: married, 0: single) */,
  "address" INTEGER /* Address code associated with the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Education level (scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "employment_status" INTEGER /* Employment status (scale of 0 to 5) */,
  "retirement_status" INTEGER /* Retirement status (1: retired, 0: active) */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the customer (1: male, 0: female) */,
  "residence_area" INTEGER /* Residential area code */,
  "customer_category" INTEGER /* Customer category for segmentation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred channel for communication (e.g., email, SMS, phone) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth for more detailed age-related analysis */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests and hobbies of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_employment_status FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_address FOREIGN KEY ("address") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_customer_category FOREIGN KEY ("customer_category") REFERENCES customer_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_retirement_status FOREIGN KEY ("retirement_status") REFERENCES retirement_statuses ("retirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the residence */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., purchase, inquiry) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the interaction occurred (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction (e.g., product purchased, inquiry details) */,
  "interaction_value" REAL /* Value of the interaction (e.g., amount spent during a purchase) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_retention" (
  "retention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Calculated retention rate for the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase made by the customer */,
  "number_of_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the customer */,
  "average_purchase_value" REAL /* Average value of purchases made by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the retention record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the retention record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_retention_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the education level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the education level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employment status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retirement_statuses" (
  "retirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retirement status */,
  "retirement_status" TEXT /* Name of the retirement status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the retirement status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the retirement status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the retirement status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender description (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the gender record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the gender record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)
